sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lawp gige ing zingsang khatpeuh ciang Gabriel
pengkul tum ke'n za ning, Sinawn lo ding'n ka khanlawh ciang It huai tanpa mu ding ka dawnteh, lungdam awngin lei nusia ning, Sinawn lo ding'n ka khanlawh ciana

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (Ka khan lawh ciang) Suangman pha kizem,
(Vantung khuapi ah) Hih thu sut sut ning,
A khang a khang a tatsa mite tawh
A mah bia in phat khawm ta ding, Sinawn lo ding'n

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mitphiat kalsungin pumthak nei ning, Pasian a
minthang den ta hen, Sinawnlo ding'n ka khanlawh ciang,
Tua khuapi ka zuat toh tak ciang in, dahna teng
mangpha khak ning ke'n, Sinawn loding'n ka khanlawh ciang.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Aki tansa minam khempeun tawh vantung hoihna
ke'n vel vel ning, Sinawn lo ding'n ka khan lawh ciang
Tuidam luanna singkung dum gei ah khawina ding
Sinawn lo ding'n ka khanlawh ciang.
